summary.en: All wireless and telecom terminal devices must obtain NTRA type approval before import or sale in Egypt under Telecommunications Regulation Law No. 10 of 2003. The NTRA approval number must be displayed on the product label in Arabic and/or English. CE Declaration of Conformity and CCC are not accepted as substitutes. Devices are tested to European/ETSI standards but a separate NTRA certification process is required.
summary.zh: 依据2003年第10号电信管理法，所有无线及电信终端设备须在进口或于埃及销售前取得NTRA型式核准。NTRA批准号须以阿拉伯语和/或英语标注于产品标签。CE符合性声明和CCC不被接受为替代。设备依据欧洲/ETSI标准进行测试，但须另行完成NTRA认证程序。
summary.zht: 依據2003年第10號電信管理法，所有無線及電信終端裝置須在進口或於埃及銷售前取得NTRA型式核准。NTRA批准號須以阿拉伯語和/或英語標注於產品標籤。CE符合性聲明和CCC不被接受為替代。裝置依據歐洲/ETSI標準進行測試，但須另行完成NTRA認證程序。

standards_or_laws: Egypt Telecommunications Regulation Law No. 10 of 2003
NTRA Type Approval Procedures and Requirements
ETSI EN 300 328 (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz), ETSI EN 301 893 (Wi-Fi 5 GHz), ETSI EN 300 440 (Bluetooth / short-range devices)
NTRA label requirement: approval number in Arabic and/or English on product

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for RF transmitters, MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment, and CCC for radio equipment modules in scope. Testing is performed to GB/T standards (GB/T 9254 for EMC, GB 4943.1 for safety). Neither SRRC nor CCC is recognised by NTRA.
summary.zh: 中国对射频发射设备要求MIIT/SRRC无线电型号核准，对电信终端设备要求MIIT进网许可证（NAL），对适用范围内的无线设备模块要求CCC认证。测试依据GB/T标准（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943.1）。SRRC和CCC均不被NTRA承认。
summary.zht: 中國對射頻發射設備要求MIIT/SRRC無線電型號核准，對電信終端裝置要求MIIT進網許可證（NAL），對適用範圍內的無線設備模組要求CCC認證。測試依據GB/T標準（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943.1）。SRRC和CCC均不被NTRA承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC Radio Type Approval (MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for applicable RF modules

gap.en: NTRA type approval is an entirely separate certification from SRRC, CCC, or CE mark. None of these are recognised by NTRA. A fresh application to NTRA with ETSI-compliant test reports from an accredited laboratory is required. The NTRA approval number must be affixed to the product label in Arabic and/or English; failure to display it is an import violation.
gap.zh: NTRA型式核准与SRRC、CCC或CE标志完全独立，NTRA不承认上述任何认证。须向NTRA提交全新申请，并提供来自认可实验室的符合ETSI的测试报告。NTRA批准号须以阿拉伯语和/或英语贴附于产品标签；未标注者将构成进口违规。
gap.zht: NTRA型式核准與SRRC、CCC或CE標誌完全獨立，NTRA不承認上述任何認證。須向NTRA提交全新申請，並提供來自認可實驗室的符合ETSI的測試報告。NTRA批准號須以阿拉伯語和/或英語貼附於產品標籤；未標注者將構成進口違規。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China SRRC approval, CCC, and CE mark do not satisfy NTRA type approval requirements. A separate NTRA certification process with ETSI-based test reports from an accredited laboratory is required before any wireless or telecom terminal device may be imported or sold in Egypt.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC批准、CCC及CE标志均不满足NTRA型式核准要求。任何无线或电信终端设备在埃及进口或销售前，须另行完成基于ETSI测试报告（来自认可实验室）的NTRA认证流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC批准、CCC及CE標誌均不滿足NTRA型式核准要求。任何無線或電信終端裝置在埃及進口或銷售前，須另行完成基於ETSI測試報告（來自認可實驗室）的NTRA認證流程。
